financial_anomaly_detection.description: Finds unusual financial patterns that may indicate errors or fraud.

material_analysis.description: Evaluates material choices and availability impacts.

quality_inspection.description: Assists with automated checks and quality scoring.

bdi.infoDescription: Le BDI sert à ajouter les frais généraux, taxes et marge bénéficiaire aux budgets. Ajustez les pourcentages selon les normes de votre entreprise.
bdi.infoFormula: BDI = (1 + Σ taux de frais et taxes) × (1 + marge bénéficiaire) − 1
bdi.infoTaxesDescription: PIS, COFINS, ISS et charges sociales varient selon la juridiction. Consultez votre comptable pour les taux corrects.
bdi.infoTitle: À propos du BDI (Frais et Dépenses Indirects)

roleDescriptions.admin: Full access to every sidebar option and application setting.
roleDescriptions.admin_office: Back-office focus with client, finance, and procurement tools.
roleDescriptions.architect: Access only to architect portal pages for project design and client management.
roleDescriptions.client: Read-only access to curated dashboards and shared documentation.
roleDescriptions.global_admin: Support staff only. Full access to all projects including architect-owned. Can be assigned only to users marked as support users.
roleDescriptions.project_manager: Full access to project tools except the Settings area.
roleDescriptions.site_supervisor: Field execution focus with delivery and build-tracking tools.
roleDescriptions.viewer: Can monitor dashboards and reports without making changes.
